message:
refactor(btree,pager,e2e,wasm): Arc<str> value migration and minor fixes

btree/cursor: migrate SqliteValue::Text constructors to .into().

pager: add missing cfg-gated helper methods for wasm compatibility.

e2e/fsqlite_executor: fix type annotation for executor compatibility.

wasm/lib: migrate SqliteValue constructors to .into().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
